response:
TOTAL AREA COVERED BY ALL 8 CIRCLES IS CALCULATED BY ADDING THE AREAS OF EACH CIRCLE. EACH SUBSEQUENT CIRCLE HAS A RADIUS THAT IS 10% LARGER THAN THE PREVIOUS ONE. THIS MEANS THE RADIUS OF THE NTH CIRCLE IS r MULTIPLIED BY 1.1 TO THE POWER OF (N-1). THE AREA OF A CIRCLE IS PI TIMES RADIUS SQUARED. SO THE TOTAL AREA IS THE SUM OF PI TIMES R SQUARED TIMES (1.1)^2N FOR N FROM 0 TO 7. THIS CAN BE EXPRESSED AS PI R SQUARED TIMES (1 + 1.21 + 1.4641 + 1.771561 + 2.14358881 + 2.582607691 + 3.10186846 + 3.712055306). THE SUM OF THESE VALUES IS 14.24682491. SO THE TOTAL AREA IS 14.24682491 PI R SQUARED.

THE CIRCUMFERENCE OF THE 5TH CIRCLE IS 2 PI TIMES R TIMES (1.1)^4. THIS EQUALS 2 PI R TIMES 1.4641. THE CIRCUMFERENCE IS THEN 2.9282 PI R. TO PLACE TEXT ALONG THIS CIRCUMFERENCE WITH A 0.5 CM GAP BETWEEN EACH CHARACTER, DIVIDE THE CIRCUMFERENCE BY 0.5. THIS GIVES 5.8564 PI R. SINCE PI IS APPROXIMATELY 3.1416, 5.8564 PI R IS APPROXIMATELY 18.403 R. TO ENSURE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF CHARACTERS IS AN INTEGER, THE MAXIMUM NUMBER IS THE FLOOR OF 18.403 R. THIS MEANS THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF CHARACTERS IS 18 R. IF R IS 1, THEN THE MAXIMUM NUMBER IS 18. IF R IS LARGER, THE NUMBER INCREASES PROPORTIONALLY. THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF CHARACTERS IS 18 R. THIS IS THE MAXIMUM NUMBER THAT CAN BE
